description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build C++ Windows Packages that builds C++ Windows packages. The workflow can be triggered manually with an optional Ice version input or called by another workflow with an ice_version input. It runs on a windows-latest environment, checks out the repository, sets up C++ and Java, builds C++ binaries, signs them with Azure Trusted Signing, and builds and signs MSI installers and NuGet packages. The workflow also uploads the resulting MSI and NuGet packages as artifacts.
